title: Author signal-classification-judge digikoma for unknown-workflow stage 3 (classify-signals)
description: Surfaced 2026-05-31 by unknown-workflow.x-tools-by-stage missingTools[] catalog. Stage 3 of unknown-workflow (classify-signals-to-candidate-workflows) walks x-candidate-workflow-mapping.patterns[] against captured signals. When matches are AMBIGUOUS (multiple candidates with similar-strength signal matches OR a candidate matches partial signals only), a bounded judgment digikoma should evaluate the candidate list and emit a classification verdict. Currently this judgment lives in agent inference; a typed digikoma would (a) make the judgment reproducible, (b) make ambiguous-classification-frequency metric (per x-minimization-program) more measurable, (c) close the typed gap at substrate/roles/unknown-workflow-conductor/.../role-surface-manifest.json.digikomaToolRefs. Candidate home: digikoma-org or wrkstrm digikoma collection. Required surfaces: fixture taking (signals, candidateWorkflows), allowlist (substrate-vocabulary), no system prompt, emits ClassificationVerdict { selectedWorkflow, confidence, rationale, alternatesConsidered }. Est 2-3 hours including fixture + tests + integration into unknown-workflow stage 3 instructions.
